tasks.task: Attend scheduled practice or training sessions to develop skills and improve physical condition.
Participate in athletic events or competitive sports according to established rules and regulations.
Maintain optimum physical fitness levels by training regularly and following nutrition plans or consulting with health professionals.
Assess performance after athletic competition, identifying strengths and weaknesses to improve future performance.
Represent teams or professional sports clubs by meeting with media, making speeches, or participating in charity events.
Lead teams by serving as captain and receiving instructions from coaches prior to events.
Maintain equipment used in a particular sport.

detailed_work_activities.title: Evaluate skills of athletes or performers.
Maintain equipment or systems to ensure proper functioning.
Perform manual service or maintenance tasks.
